name: control mapping: /legal-review-mark exits 2 when the (framework, control_id) pair is not in compliance/controls.yaml
command:
printf "- framework: soc2-tsc
  control_id: CC8.1
  satisfied_by: [rubric_rule]
  legal_review_status: pending
" > controls.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/legal-review-mark.sh" --framework eu-ai-act --control-id Article-99 --reviewer x --date 2026-05-13 --controls-file "$PWD/controls.yaml"
